blocks.text: Hovland Tees Off at TPC Sawgrass as Norway's Big Thursday Arrives

Three must-watch events converge on Thursday — golf's unofficial fifth major opens, Norwegian cycling hopes tackle Italian roads, and rain drops into CS2's elite league. A banner day for Norwegian sport.
THE PLAYERS Championship tees off at TPC Sawgrass — Viktor Hovland and Kristoffer Reitan carry the Norwegian flag at golf's richest stage
Tirreno-Adriatico 2026 rolls on — Andreas Leknessund and Søren Wærenskjold battle across grueling Italian terrain in this key spring form guide
ESL Pro League S22 — rain (100 Thieves) hunts crucial points in one of CS2's most prestigious team competitions
